title: Tool Runner 的自动 compaction：突破上下文窗口限制
title_en: Tool Runner Auto-Compaction: Breaking Past Context Window Limits

body.concept: Tool Runner 支持自动 compaction（上下文压缩）。当对话的 token 使用量超过阈值时，SDK 会自动生成之前对话的摘要来替代原始内容，从而释放上下文空间。这让长时间运行的 agentic 任务可以超越单次上下文窗口的限制。
body.analogy: 就像笔记本写满了一页，你把要点摘抄到新的一页，然后翻过去继续写。旧页的细节丢失了，但关键信息保留了下来。

body_en.concept: Tool Runner supports automatic compaction. When token usage exceeds a threshold, the SDK generates summaries of earlier conversation turns to replace the original content, freeing up context space. This allows long-running agentic tasks to continue beyond a single context window.
body_en.analogy: Like a notebook that's full—you copy the key points onto a fresh page, flip past the old one, and keep writing. The details of the old page are gone, but the essential information is preserved.

diagram:
flowchart LR
    A([Start]) --> B[Tokens accumulate]
    B --> C{Hit threshold?}
    C -->|no| B
    C -->|yes| D[SDK summarizes context]
    D --> E[Old messages replaced]
    E --> F[Context space freed]
    F --> G[Tool loop continues]
    G --> B
